appName.message: AI Compare - OneClick to compare ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek and more.

extDescription.message: AI Compare - Compare responses from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek and more in one click. Find the best solution quickly.

commandDescription.message: Hotkey: (⌘+M on Mac, Ctrl+M on Windows)

contactInfo.message: If you want to add more sites, please contact me at AIShortcuts@outlook.com

promptPrefixDescription.message: Your question will be appended after this preset text before sending to AI.

promptPrefixPlaceholder.message: Example: You are a senior game development consultant. Please prioritize system design, performance, and maintainability.

promptPrefixHelp.message: Leave empty to disable prompt prefix.

localFileSecurityMessage.message: When copying local files, browsers can only access file paths, not file contents.
